end end f=#v return j(i)end,function(T,y)local j=R(y)local d=function(d,Q,v,S)return f(T,{d;Q,v;S},y,j)end return d end return(G(9598465-111687,{}))(j(i))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or
